caption: MCPs are like plugins that let Claude actually DO things, drive your browser, control your files, make 3D, and more. Here are 5 of the coolest, all open-source and free. Save this and go star your favorite.

slides.headline: Context7
slides.body: Feeds your AI up-to-date docs for any library, so it stops writing outdated, hallucinated code. Just add 'use context7' to your prompt.

slides.headline: Blender MCP
slides.body: Build and edit 3D scenes just by chatting with Claude. It went viral for a reason, describe it, and Blender makes it.

slides.headline: Playwright MCP
slides.body: Microsoft's official MCP that lets your AI open and drive a real browser, click, type, and pull data from any site.

slides.headline: Desktop Commander
slides.body: Gives Claude control of your files and terminal. It can read, edit, run commands, and manage your whole project for you.

slides.headline: Serena
slides.body: Turns Claude into a real coding agent with semantic search across your whole codebase, like giving it an IDE's brain.

slides.headline: Save this before you lose it
slides.body: There are thousands more, which are you adding first?
